% VAT Calculator

Add VAT to a price or remove VAT to find the net amount. Works with any VAT rate.

Enter an amount

VAT rates by country

Country Standard Reduced
🇬🇧 United Kingdom20%5%
🇩🇪 Germany19%7%
🇫🇷 France20%5.5%
🇪🇸 Spain21%10%
🇮🇪 Ireland23%13.5%
🇮🇹 Italy22%10%
🇳🇱 Netherlands21%9%
🇸🇪 Sweden25%12%

What is VAT?

Value Added Tax (VAT) is a consumption tax applied to goods and services. It is collected at each stage of the supply chain but ultimately paid by the end consumer. Businesses registered for VAT can reclaim the VAT they pay on business purchases.

Frequently asked questions

How do I add VAT to a price?

Multiply the net price by (1 + VAT rate/100). For example, £100 + 20% VAT = £100 × 1.20 = £120.

How do I remove VAT from a price?

Divide the gross price by (1 + VAT rate/100). For example, £120 ÷ 1.20 = £100 net price.

What is the difference between VAT and sales tax?

VAT is collected at every stage of production and distribution. Sales tax (used in the USA) is only collected at the final point of sale to the consumer.
